title: Ma`aday #4572
definition:
Maadai = "ornament of Jehovah"

 1) an exile of the sons of Bani who put away a foreign wife in the
    time of Ezra
nasbUsage:

 1) an exile of the sons of Bani who put away a foreign wife in the
    time of Ezra

    NASB:  an Isr.
